body:
- Removes sizes from function arguments -> pack/unpack
 - Simplies documentation
 - Moves `itropo_upper`/`itropo_lower` to `InterpolationCoefficients` as `tropo_lims`
 - Adds type restrictions to `upper`,`lower`,`upper_aux`,`lower_aux` in `GasOptics`
 - Adds `StaticArrays` to reduce allocations
 - Reformulates `interpolation2D` and `interpolation3D`

This PR should make extending some of the methods in `GasOptics` and `GasOptics_Kernels` to per-grid-point much simpler.
title: Simplify rrtmgp interfaces

body:
- Moves `tropo` and `tropo_lims` to `AtmosphericState`

This was done because `tropo_lims` is computed based on `minloc` (`findfirst`) over layers, which is better suited in the `AtmosphericState` constructor, rather than the compute kernels so that the compute kernels can operate per grid point.
title: Move `tropo` and `tropo_lims` to `AtmosphericState`
